caption: Something's stirring in the Big Muddy depths... 🌊 New sounds from one of our own are bubbling to the surface. Get ready to dive in. Release date dropping soon!
media_suggestion: A blurry, atmospheric photo of a recording studio, an abstract visualizer, or a short, intriguing audio snippet.

caption: Meet [Artist Name] – the raw energy and lyrical prowess behind some of our most soulful tracks. Their sound is an unfiltered journey. Dive into their world via the link in bio. You won't regret it.
media_suggestion: A candid, high-quality photo of the artist, perhaps in a natural setting or performing live.

caption: Taking it back to [Year] with [Artist/Album Name]. This one still hits different, a true Big Muddy classic. What's your go-to track from our archives? Let us know below! 👇
media_suggestion: Vintage album art, an old band photo, or a short clip from the featured song with original artwork.

caption: Late nights, early mornings, and a whole lot of heart. This is where the magic happens, the grit and the glory of bringing new music to life. 🎶 #StudioLife #MakingMusic #BigMuddyRecords
media_suggestion: A snapshot of studio equipment, a recording session in progress, or a band rehearsing in a raw, authentic space.

caption: The wait is almost over! We're beyond stoked to announce [Artist Name]'s new single, '[Song Title]', drops on [Date]! This one's going to hit hard. Pre-save now and be the first to hear it. Link in bio.
media_suggestion: The official single/album artwork, a short teaser video with the release date.

caption: Need some new sounds for your weekend sonic adventures? Our 'Big Muddy Deep Dives' playlist is packed with our artists and some other indie gems we're currently obsessing over. Link in stories!
media_suggestion: A visually appealing playlist cover art, a screenshot of the playlist on a streaming platform, or a short video showcasing tracks.

caption: We love hearing from you, the heart of our community! What's a question you've always wanted to ask one of our artists, or about Big Muddy Records itself? Drop it in the comments! We might answer in an upcoming story. 👇
media_suggestion: A text-based graphic with the question, a photo of the label team, or a collage of artist images.

caption: [Artist Name] is hitting the road and bringing their electrifying energy to a city near you! Catch them live at [Venue/City] on [Date]. Tickets are flying, grab yours before they're gone! 🎸 Tour dates & tickets in bio.
media_suggestion: An official tour poster, a dynamic live performance photo, or a short video clip from a previous show.

caption: Every single note, every lyric, every late-night session – it's all a labor of love. Thank you for being an integral part of the Big Muddy journey. We wouldn't be here, championing raw, authentic sound, without our incredible artists and you, our listeners. 🙏
media_suggestion: The Big Muddy Records logo with a heartfelt message, a collage of artist photos, or a scenic shot representing the 'Big Muddy' ethos (e.g., a river, a wild landscape).
